risk_flags.message: Payment proof is missing or insufficient for the reimbursement case.
The file name indicates 1,990.20 CNY, while extracted invoice records include USD invoice lines.
The case should be reviewed or rechecked before approval.

agent_review.message: The uploaded file is treated as demo_case_02_mar30_mar31_total_1990_20_minimal_redacted.pdf. The file name indicates a total of 1,990.20 CNY. Cached OCR-style data converts the reimbursement evidence into structured records, including invoice lines and a bank-statement-style total.

The case contains invoice materials, but payment proof is missing or insufficient. Because some extracted invoice records are in USD while the file-indicated total is CNY, the case requires cross-currency review and cannot be approved from the filename alone.
The audit recommendation is human review or one recheck. The case should not be blindly approved until payment evidence and cross-currency consistency are confirmed.
